ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "function" TEXT /* Name of the repository or its function */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the repository has received */,
  "watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers monitoring the repository */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks created from the repository */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the repository was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the repository was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the programming language */,
  "parity" INTEGER /* Whether the language is parity or not */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were recorded */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars on this date */,
  "watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers on this date */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks on this date */,
  "commits" INTEGER /* Number of commits on this date */,
  "issues" INTEGER /* Number of issues on this date */,
  "pull_requests" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests on this date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_metrics_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, contributor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being contributed to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., commit, issue, pull request) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_contributions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_tags_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the issue is reported */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, low) */,
  "assignee" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue or pull request being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES repository_issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository associated with the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the external service */,
  "service_url" TEXT /* URL of the external service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_services_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_subscribers" (
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscriber */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being subscribed to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribing */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date of subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscriber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_subscribers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_subscribers_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., administrator, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_collaborators_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
